prestazioni: Full bolt-on S63B44T0 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) Stage 2+ tune by MSS Performance with custom ECU flash targeting 720whp/680wtq on E85, utilizing a Wagner Tuning Competition intercooler kit (FMIC-020) and Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with 200-cell catalytic converters for optimized backpressure and spool

Precision Turbo & Engine PT6766 CEA turbochargers (67mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with billet compressor wheels, upgraded wastegates, and custom 3.5" V-band downpipes by FTP (Full Throttle Performance) to eliminate OEM turbo lag and support 800whp on race gas

Full drivetrain reinforcement including MFactory 3.91:1 LSD differential with carbon fiber clutch pack, G-Power F10 M5-specific driveshaft with upgraded CV joints, and a 7-speed M-DCT transmission tune by Dimsport for lightning-fast shifts (0.08s) and launch control optimized for 0-60mph in 2.8s
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-F10 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with Vorsteiner V-FF 103 21" forged wheels (9.5" front, 12" rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear)

Full OEM+ M Performance carbon fiber exterior package (mirror caps, side gills, rear spoiler) with custom matte Nardo Grey wrap by 3M, including de-chromed trim and gloss black kidney grilles with M Performance badging

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position carbon fiber bucket seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, M Performance Alcantara steering wheel with custom red stitching, and a full digital dash conversion using a Motec C127 display with live telemetry for boost, AFR, and oil temps
